label: Saltstone Sleeping Cell
description: Saltstone Sleeping Cell serves as a compact bedroom cut into the fused basalt mass of Terminus Shutterhouse, its proportions governed by thick partition walls that dampen terminator temperature swings. A recessed sleep platform rises from the floor as a single basalt-saltstone unit, flanked by carved storage niches that eliminate freestanding furnishings under persistent tidal stresses. The sole aperture remains deep-set behind layered shutter baffles that admit controlled bands of light without exposing the room to Saltharrow’s hard white glare. Polished saltstone thresholds and dust-catching grooves at the base of the walls manage mineral-laden haze carried in from the city’s shuttered arcades.
